`wave` field is set to the string value `Audit` instead of a number. The field must be a number ≥ 1. The string `Audit` is not a valid YAML number and will break wave-based execution ordering. All other audit tasks correctly use `wave: 4`.
findings.fix: Change `wave: Audit` to `wave: 4` to match tasks 8 and 9.

Skill link uses a relative path `../../.claude/skills/code-reviewing/SKILL.md` instead of the canonical `~/.claude/skills/code-reviewing/SKILL.md` used in the template and in tasks 9, 11.

Code files listed for audit (`SecurityConfig.java`, `.gitignore`, `.env.example`, `scripts/install-hooks.sh`, `infra/docker-compose.yml`, `docs/local-setup.md`) are plain text, not markdown links `[name](path)`. All Context Files entries must be markdown links.
findings.fix: Convert each plain-text file path to a markdown link: e.g., `- [SecurityConfig.java](../../../backend/src/main/java/com/botfunnel/security/SecurityConfig.java)`.
